decisions.decision: Use 'See the factory. Meet your supplier. Cut to the chase — save 20%+ on procurement.' as new hero headline
decisions.rationale: More action-oriented, specific benefit (20%+) aligns better with CTA 'Book a Free Discovery Call'

decisions.decision: Change subtitle from 'handle the logistics' to 'coordinate the arrangements'
decisions.rationale: WAG does not do logistics - clarified in Lean Canvas. Coordination is accurate.

decisions.decision: Remove StatsBar (bg-navy section with animated counters)
decisions.rationale: User requested removal. Stats saved to .planning/quick/260320-0ez-StatsBar-ORIGINAL.tsx

decisions.decision: Reduce hero padding from py-20 md:py-28 to py-16 md:py-22
decisions.rationale: User requested 20% reduction to fit more content above fold

next_action: No immediate next action - deployed successfully. Awaiting further instructions.
context_notes: Completed hero section optimization: updated slogan, removed StatsBar, reduced padding. All changes deployed to production. Critique identified 3 additional issues (navbar/hero visual disconnect, right side video area waste, mobile H1 line breaks) that were not addressed - user may want to revisit. Previous Phase 11 work is still pending human_actions (GBP, directories, guest posts).
